source: KuteTailor Open API — Men.zip EXCELs + Open API PDF (authoritative) + verified vs live order 623731 (2026-07-20)

saveOrder.auth: bearer token — OAuth password grant, client_id=mtm-api, user=ARUAP. Secret + password in ~/Desktop/GCC_Fabric_Handoff/keys/kutetailor_creds.json
saveOrder.submitFalse: save as DRAFT (no production); submit:true = place order
saveOrder.craftsFormat: comma-joined per garment: "<code>" or "<code>:<content>"; factory fills unspecified defaults
saveOrder.measures: orderSizes[] may be EMPTY for a draft (tailor adds at fitting); customer{} may be minimal for a draft
